name: connect
context: Stripe Connect: marketplace payments, platform accounts, onboarding, and payouts
info: Stripe Connect enables marketplace and platform payment flows where a platform facilitates payments between buyers and sellers (or service providers). Connect supports three account types — Standard, Express, and Custom — each with different onboarding experiences and dashboard access. This guide covers account type selection, onboarding flows with Account Links, creating payments on behalf of connected accounts (direct charges, destination charges, separate charges and transfers), and managing payouts to connected accounts.
triggers: split payments between platform and seller
create a platform with stripe connect

sections.title: Connect account types
sections.body: **Standard** accounts use Stripe's full onboarding and dashboard — lowest integration effort but sellers manage their own Stripe dashboard. **Express** accounts use a streamlined onboarding with a limited dashboard — good for gig economy platforms. **Custom** accounts give the platform full control over onboarding UI and dashboard — highest effort but fully white-labeled. Choose based on the level of control your platform needs vs. integration effort.

sections.title: Onboarding flows
sections.body: Create accounts with `stripe.accounts.create({ type, country, email, capabilities })`. Generate onboarding links with `stripe.accountLinks.create({ account, refresh_url, return_url, type: 'account_onboarding' })`. Redirect sellers to the link URL. After completion, verify `charges_enabled` and `payouts_enabled`. Track progress asynchronously via `account.updated` events in [[stripe/webhooks]]. Account links expire — regenerate if the seller doesn't complete onboarding.

sections.title: Payments and transfers
sections.body: **Direct charges**: create payment on the connected account with `stripeAccount` header, take `application_fee_amount`. **Destination charges**: charge on platform, specify `transfer_data.destination` and `transfer_data.amount`. **Separate charges and transfers**: charge on platform, then `stripe.transfers.create()` to one or more connected accounts. Direct charges work best for single-seller purchases. Destination charges for simple splits. Separate charges for complex multi-seller orders. See [[stripe/payments]] for PaymentIntent details.

sections.title: Payout management
sections.body: Payouts transfer funds from a connected account's Stripe balance to their external account (bank or debit card). Default schedule is automatic (daily in most countries). Set manual with `stripe.accounts.update(id, { settings: { payouts: { schedule: { interval: 'manual' } } } })`. Create manual payouts with `stripe.payouts.create({ amount, currency }, { stripeAccount })`. Track with `payout.paid` and `payout.failed` events via [[stripe/webhooks]].
